titleStmt.title: SII 31.319: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 319. (A.R. No. B 304 of 1938.) BALAPANAGŪḌŪRU, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab set up in the Śiva temple.
This undated inscription may be assigned to the 16th century A.D. on the basis palaeography and internal evidence.

Broken and partly mutiḷated. It registers the gift of a flower garden entrusted to Naṁbi Tipparāju, by Sōmalraju Timmayadēva maharāja for maintaining the flower offerings to the god Perumālu situated at Bamḍibōyilaguḍuru.
It also records the construction of large well and picotta (ētāmu) in the center of the garden.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
rdā lu nu Ā
nahōmaṁdunnura sōmalrāju timmayadēva ma
hārājulu naṁbi tipparājuku yicina dharmmaśāsana
mu baṁdibōyila gūḍūri perumāḷaku puṣpālaki
guḍula vellaṁnu pappulavāri tōṁṭa yirusa doṁ
sarvamānyamugānu Ācaṁdrārkasdhāyi Aṣṭa
bhōna(ga)tējasvāmyamugānu yistimi gāna Ā
pānu puṣpāla ceṭula tamakugānu ceppuko
nidi . yī tōṁṭaku doravi drovvi yēṁta
mupeṭṭi nimityamu yēkāpu sēsinānu saṁ
rvvamānyamugānu yistimigāna vevasāya
ṁ sēyiṁcuka bradikēdi yī tōṁṭaki rā
jyamu mayinānu celliṁciri vāni cellaniki E
rāju puccukonnānu tamatalliṁdaṁḍri
ni caṁppina pāpānaṁbōduru . gaṁga karada kapi
lalaṁ jaṁpina pāpāna bōduru . maṁgaḷama
hā śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.319 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
